steps.title: Use the counterintuitive effect
steps.content: Normally, rising prices reduce demand. Here, rising prices made buyers enter the market because they expected prices to keep increasing. The blank needs a verb meaning to create or produce demand.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: A means to make money from something. B means to estimate value. D means to take advantage of something that already exists. The sentence needs a verb for causing demand to arise. The answer is C.
